name: Kiwi Sherbet
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak gelatin in 1/4 cup cold water for 5 minutes.
2. Place the soaked gelatin in the top of a double boiler over boiling water and stir until dissolved.
3. Beat egg yolks well, then beat in 3/4 cup sugar, the salt, Grand Marnier liqueur, and crushed kiwi fruit.
4. When well mixed, beat in the dissolved gelatin. Mix thoroughly.
5. Freeze the mixture in ice cube trays.
6. Once frozen, place the cubes in a chilled bowl and break into chunks.
7. Beat with an electric mixer until smooth and fluffy.
8. Beat egg whites until soft peaks form. Gradually add the remaining 1/4 cup sugar and beat until stiff.
9. Fold the beaten egg whites into the kiwi mixture.
10. Place the mixture in a covered container and return to the freezer until firm, stirring occasionally.
11. Serve garnished with sliced fresh kiwi if desired.
